I have an HTML landing page file.
It is currently blank, but what i want the file to be can be found in the file description.
I want you to completely modify it adding
thing like structure and content (texts, sections,
CTAs, prices), but change the ENTIRE visual design
following these specifications:

## GLOBAL AESTHETIC CHANGE

### Base design:
- Background: #000000 (pure black)
- Remove all white or light backgrounds
- Main texts: #ffffff and rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
- Secondary texts: rgba(255,255,255,0.5)

### Main gradient:
- from-[#FA93FA] via-[#C967E8] to-[#9333EA]
- Use on: highlighted titles, CTA buttons,
  card borders and hero elements

### Glassmorphism on all cards:
- background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05)
- backdrop-filter: blur(20px)
- -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px)
- border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)
- border-radius: 16px

### CTA Buttons:
- Background with gradient #FA93FA → #9333EA
- Hover: increased brightness + slight scale(1.03)
- border-radius: 12px
- font-weight: bold

### Hero Section:
- Background: black with subtle purple glow/particles
- Main title with text gradient #FA93FA → #C967E8
- Subtitle in rgba(255,255,255,0.7)

### Typography:
- Use Inter or Poppins from Google Fonts
- Clear hierarchy: large hero, medium sections,
  normal body

### Additional effects:
- Shadows: box-shadow with purple
  rgba(201,103,232,0.3)
- Smooth transitions: transition: all 0.3s ease
- Smooth scroll: scroll-behavior: smooth

Return the complete and functional HTML file,
ready to upload to Netlify or GitHub Pages.
